title: The Alliance Collides with Kaido’s Forces
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Yamato, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Momonosuke, Robin as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: You bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: AYAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: UWAAH!

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: Where's Yamato!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Forgive us....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The next day we

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We lost sight of those two...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: skull dome, live stage

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: On that fiery day...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The day of Kozuki Oden's death! As his castle burned to the ground around him....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: This guy suddenly disappeared!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And where did he run to!? I'll tell you! The future!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Twenty years passed, and suddenly he and his men appeared here in Wano, looking exactly the same!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: The next time I

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: All by the hand of oden's wife toki! She cast their grudge into the future!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And the witch used her sorcery to do it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We're supposed to buy that..?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There are kids running around with topknots all over!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Kozuki are extinct! They were wiped out a long time ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ain't that right, boys!? Gyahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WaHaha! Sure is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You got it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Come on, we can't even see, y'know!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Bring 'em down, y'know!? Lemme dig out his eyeballs, y'know!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What do we do, boss?

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: I can't stand seeing momo-chan like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Samuel will definitely make their move...!! We just have to wait!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Should we stab him!? Beat him!? Boil him!? Guhaha!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Stay strong, nice Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE- SAMA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Gyaha Hahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke- Sama...!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke- Sama....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The infiltration force had success- fully infiltrated the banquet.

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: MOMONOSUKE- SAMA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, aboard the submarine polar tang,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Red Scabbards have arrived at the rear entrance of the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Get as close to the island as you can!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aye Aye!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're already being sucked in by the powerful tide.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once we breach the surface, we're only gonna have one chance!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Bepo, shachi, penguin, you guys ready!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Aye Aye, Captain!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: We're counting on you, Tra- Guy-San.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, then, we'll soon see the state of the island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We're broaching the surface at the rear of Onigashima!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
